browserQa.mobileQa: skipped: mobile is not a current target
flow: verify command recommendation cards include battlefield context

observed.contextExample: 東方辺境防衛線 / 塹壕 / 敵圧42 / 危険78%
initialRecommendationExamples: 第1師団師団長をアルンハイムへ変更 改善+47 / 威信-6
第2師団師団長をアルンハイムへ変更 改善+47 / 威信-6
degradedRecommendationExamples: 参謀長をクルーガーへ変更 改善+57 / 威信-5
参謀長をフォスへ変更 改善+57 / 威信-6
参謀長をアルンハイムへ変更 改善+47 / 威信-5

implemented: Staff recommendations now include battlefield terrain, enemy pressure, risk, and structure count in their scoring.
Division commander recommendations now weight morale, control, and reserve readiness according to current battlefield context.
Army Camp recommendation cards show a battlefield-context line so the player can see why a command replacement is relevant now.
Risk display is formatted as an integer percentage.
deferred: Enemy composition-specific command recommendations remain later work.
Political backlash and officer loyalty events remain later work.
Doctrine-intent-aware recommendation weighting remains later work.
